channel.title: ncpu on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in ncpu on IT notes

item.title: hw.(machine|model|ncpu)
item.description: To get an overview of the system: # sysctl -a | egrep -i 'hw.machine|hw.model|hw.ncpu' hw.machine: amd64 hw.model: Intel(R) Xeon(R) Silver 4110 CPU @ 2.10GHz hw.ncpu: 16 hw.machine_arch: amd64
